prompt: Align show arp output with VRP
note: Changed show arp and its filtered variants to VRP-style two-line headers, separators, D-0/S-0 type markers, and Total/Dynamic/Static/Interface summaries while preserving colon-separated MAC addresses. Empty tables now render the full zero-count layout. 308 tests pass.
decisions: Keep interface ARP count at zero because VVRP local interface addresses are intentionally excluded from the ARP table
